MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT REGINALD KELLEY'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 430.10(C). DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF CARIDEO V. KELLEY ET AL., SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT CASE NO. CGC-12-518651. IT SERVES JUDICIAL ECONOMY TO FIRST DETERMINE THE ISSUE ALREADY PENDING IN THE CARIDEO CASE, SET FOR TRIAL IN JUNE 2014, AS TO WHETHER THERE ARE DEFENSES TO ENFORCEMENT OF THE PROMISSORY NOTE THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THIS COLLECTION ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-13-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT REGINALD KELLEY'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained pursuant to CCP sec. 430.10(c). Defendants' request for judicial notice is granted. The case is stayed pending the outcome of Carideo v. Kelley et al., San Francisco Superior Court Case No. CGC-12-518651. It serves judicial economy to first determine the issue already pending in the Carideo case, set for trial in June 2014, as to whether there are defenses to enforcement of the promissory note that is the subject of this collection action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
